title: 25 Tamil Films Everyone Must Watch
description: From Nayakan to Vikram — the definitive Navras guide to Tamil cinema's greatest films.
intro: Tamil cinema has given India some of its most original filmmakers and most daring stories. This list is the essential starting point for anyone exploring Kollywood.

entries.blurb: India's answer to The Godfather. Kamal Haasan's greatest.

film.title: Nayakan
film.verdict: India's answer to The Godfather. Kamal Haasan's greatest.

entries.blurb: Nostalgia and longing distilled to absolute perfection.

film.verdict: Nostalgia and longing distilled to absolute perfection.

entries.blurb: Three legends. One unstoppable collision of Tamil mass cinema.

film.title: Vikram
film.verdict: Three legends. One unstoppable collision of Tamil mass cinema.

entries.blurb: Tamil cinema's most ambitious production design ever.

film.title: Kanguva
film.verdict: Tamil cinema's most ambitious production design ever.

entries.blurb: Suriya's most powerful performance. Required viewing for all Indians.

film.title: Jai Bhim
film.verdict: Required viewing. One of the most important Indian films ever.
